chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-433 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A No.1192/24. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2026. Syed Sardar Hussain Shah, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Mumtaz Alam Laghari, Advocate for Respondent No.7. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh. ***************************************** Counsel for Petitioner submits that an Application dated 09.09.2024 moved to the Registrar of Trade Unions, Hyderabad Region is still pending and has still not been decided after considerable lapse of time. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, present in Court submits that if the Application of Petitioner is pending before Respondent No.4, same shall be adjudicated on merits. Learned counsel for Respondent No.7 raised no objection and submits that the directions may be issued to the Respondent No.4 for deciding the Application moved by the Petitioner in accordance with law. At this stage, the petitioner's counsel, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. In view of the foregoing, the instant Petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.4/ competent authority to decide the Petitioner’s pending Application dated 09.09.2024 by speaking order within one month in accordance with law after granting the Petitioner as well as Respondent No.7 a fair opportunity of hearing under intimation to this Court. Let a copy of this order be communicated with the Respondent No.4. JUDGE Ali.
